final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cat's daily life.

Style/medium: needs a "治愈系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Studio Ghibli cozy interior scenes, Japanese ほっこり (hokkori) illustration tradition, 1990s Japanese pet photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include an orange tabby cat lying on a windowsill as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include a snowy winter street view outside the window, warm indoor setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, cozy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a fluffy, soft fur texture treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
